data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for photo verification.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the photo verification feature, specifically the optional selfie for attendance proof. However, the provided evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case outlines the need for this feature but lacks concrete evidence of its existence or functionality, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of photo verification functionality or related API endpoints to validate the requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the photo verification requirement.
